title: Brutally Honest College Tour Pt. 1 #unc #duke #college #collegeadmissions #university
body: So what about UNC Wilmington? Looks like just the triad area! You should get out more we have a lot more colleges than those three, and what about Duke like what???
author: @jasong7228

title: Is UNCG a good school to attend?
body: I'm going to UNCG this fall.  I was there in 2019 and deferred last year for personal reasons.  I really loved the campus and the teachers.  Like you said, no matter what subject, they know their stuff, they're easy to talk to, and want to help you succeed.  The campus is clean, big but not huge, you feel safe walking at night from evening classes.  The food is good, on and off campus, there's great little diners off of Walker if you're down that way for nursing or media, theater.  It's just a great atmosphere.
author: @katemccrea6963

title: Is UNCG a good school to attend?
body: Wow, i loves this video! I’m an incoming freshman at UNCG and a psych major too. Definitely looking for more content 🙂

title: Is UNCG a good school to attend?

author: @princessThehost02

title: Is UNCG a good school to attend?
body: I finally got into UNCG after 2 and a half years. (I was a visiting student there but I finally got admitted) The people scare me on campus and I’m completely alone. I haven’t made friends and people judge me. But last year somebody put soap in the fountain outside the cafe so be prepared to see some shit 😂
author: @TheSunniDays

title: Is UNCG a good school to attend?
body:
Hey Mia! As a psych major, what would you say your work load is like? Also, I know this is a very relative question but would you say that UNCG is a hard school?- are you naturally smart? What would be some advice you could give to upcoming freshman? Can you stay in the dorms over the summer and over holidays like in other colleges?
I would obv love another video lol

title: college move in day vlog! (UNC Greensboro) | Laniya Smith
body: Congrats and welcome to campus!! (I'm a sophomore at UNCG) Also while I am here, if you aren't already signed up, I would recommend signing up for the First Year Experience class! It is amazing and truly helpful! I hope you love the campus and that you have a great first year!
author: @faithh2919

title: college move in day vlog! (UNC Greensboro) | Laniya Smith
body:
Hello! If you are looking for a sign then this is it💕

I just wanna tell you and everyone who is reading the comments that you should never give up on youtube even if you feel discouraged. I know how frustrating it is to work on a video but barely get the recognition you deserve. Trust me, you will get there. Whenever you feel like giving up, I hope this comment inspires you💕

We small youtubers need to stick together and support each other. We need to encourage one another and help each other out💖

PS: you are so underrated, you deserve more subscribers your videos are so good!!!


edit- omg thx for 22 likes

title: college move in day vlog! (UNC Greensboro) | Laniya Smith
body: Like ohh myy🥺🥺🥺! This video almost made me cried😭! I am like the most hyper energetic person in my family and as I got older my relationship with certain ppl in my family drifted away and this brought back memories of me and my family and now the relationships with my family is on the road to recovery!🥰😊😊😊😊😊! It was knowing how to get people to react for me! Truly a gift God gave me, this video reminded me! Wow I’m in aw🥺 time to aggravate my family😂😂😂 noo but time to get them going again with my positive energy!☺️❤️

title: UNCG | Guided Campus Tour
body: As a die hard Western Carolina fan (and future student) I have to admit that UNC Greensboro has one of the most scenic and beautiful campuses I have ever seen. I went there for a Trombone festival back in my 8th Grade year, and I gotta admit, I had a pleasant experience there. WCU is still more pretty in my opinion, but UNCG is up there. Go Cats baby!!
